ddls:
CREATE TABLE "compounds" (
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compound */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the compound */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of compound (e.g., NRP, Saccharide, PK) */,
  "chemical_structure" TEXT /* Chemical structure of the compound */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the compound */,
  "biological_activity" TEXT /* Biological activity of the compound */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the compound data (e.g., literature, database, experiment) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the compound was added to the database */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last date the compound record was modified */,
  "curated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the researcher who curated the compound data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compound_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compounds_curated_by FOREIGN KEY ("curated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compound_organism_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound */,
  "organism_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organism */,
  "similarity_score" REAL /* Similarity score between the compound and organism */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., produces, inhibits, enhances) */,
  "evidence" TEXT /* Evidence supporting the relationship */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the relationship data (e.g., literature, database, experiment) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the relationship was added to the database */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last date the relationship record was modified */,
  "curated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the researcher who curated the relationship data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compound_organism_relationships_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compound_organism_relationships_curated_by FOREIGN KEY ("curated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference for the compound (e.g., BGC0000457) */,
  "reference_type" TEXT /* Type of reference (e.g., publication, database entry) */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the reference (if applicable) */,
  "pmid" TEXT /* PMID of the reference (if applicable) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the reference was added to the database */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last date the reference record was modified */,
  "curated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the researcher who curated the reference data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_references_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_references_curated_by FOREIGN KEY ("curated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "type_classification" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of compound (e.g., NRP, Saccharide, PK) */,
  "sub_type" TEXT /* More specific sub-type of the compound (e.g., cyclic NRP, linear NRP) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the classification data (e.g., literature, database, experiment) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the classification was added to the database */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last date the classification record was modified */,
  "curated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the researcher who curated the classification data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_type_classification_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_type_classification_curated_by FOREIGN KEY ("curated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, guest) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution to which the user belongs */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in to the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "compound_id" INTEGER /* ID of the compound */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the annotation */,
  "annotation" TEXT /* Annotation text */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., biological activity, structural feature) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the annotation (e.g., literature, experiment) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the annotation was added to the database */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last date the annotation record was modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_compound_id FOREIGN KEY ("compound_id") REFERENCES compounds ("compound_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
